entity.description: Describes the configuration of the new component.

appId.description: The unique ID of the Amplify app associated with the component.

environmentName.description: The name of the backend environment that is a part of the Amplify app.

sourceId.description: The unique ID of the component in its original source system, such as Figma.

componentType.description: The type of the component. This can be an Amplify custom UI component or another custom component.

properties.description: Describes the component's properties. You can't specify tags as a valid property for properties.

variants.description: A list of the component's variants. A variant is a unique style configuration of a main component.

overrides.description: Describes the component's properties that can be overriden in a customized instance of the component. You can't specify tags as a valid property for overrides.

bindingProperties.description: The information to connect a component's properties to data at runtime. You can't specify tags as a valid property for bindingProperties.

collectionProperties.description: The data binding configuration for the component's properties. Use this for a collection component. You can't specify tags as a valid property for collectionProperties.

createdAt.description: The time that the component was created.

modifiedAt.description: The time that the component was modified.

tags.description: One or more key-value pairs to use when tagging the component.

events.description: Describes the events that can be raised on the component. Use for the workflow feature in Amplify Studio that allows you to bind events and actions to components.

schemaVersion.description: The schema version of the component when it was imported.

entity.description: Describes the configuration of the new form.

appId.description: The unique ID of the Amplify app associated with the form.

environmentName.description: The name of the backend environment that is a part of the Amplify app.

formActionType.description: The operation to perform on the specified form.

style.description: Stores the configuration for the form's style.

tokenReference.description: A reference to a design token to use to bind the form's style properties to an existing theme.
A reference to a design token to use to bind the form's style properties to an existing theme.

outerPadding.description: The size of the outer padding for the form.

tokenReference.description: A reference to a design token to use to bind the form's style properties to an existing theme.

dataType.description: The type of data source to use to create the form.

dataSourceType.description: The data source type, either an Amplify DataStore model or a custom data type.

dataTypeName.description: The unique name of the data type you are using as the data source for the form.

fields.description: Stores the information about the form's fields.

sectionalElements.description: Stores the visual helper elements for the form that are not associated with any data.

schemaVersion.description: The schema version of the form when it was imported.

tags.description: One or more key-value pairs to use when tagging the form.

cta.description: Stores the call to action configuration for the form.

excluded.description: Specifies whether the button is visible on the form.

fixed.description: The field position is fixed and doesn't change in relation to other fields.

rightOf.description: The field position is to the right of the field specified by the string.

below.description: The field position is below the field specified by the string.

excluded.description: Specifies whether the button is visible on the form.

fixed.description: The field position is fixed and doesn't change in relation to other fields.

rightOf.description: The field position is to the right of the field specified by the string.

below.description: The field position is below the field specified by the string.

excluded.description: Specifies whether the button is visible on the form.

fixed.description: The field position is fixed and doesn't change in relation to other fields.

rightOf.description: The field position is to the right of the field specified by the string.

below.description: The field position is below the field specified by the string.

labelDecorator.description: Specifies an icon or decoration to display on the form.

entity.description: Describes the configuration of the new theme.

appId.description: The unique ID for the Amplify app associated with the theme.

environmentName.description: The name of the backend environment that is a part of the Amplify app.

createdAt.description: The time that the theme was created.

modifiedAt.description: The time that the theme was modified.

values.description: A list of key-value pairs that defines the properties of the theme.

overrides.description: Describes the properties that can be overriden to customize a theme.

tags.description: One or more key-value pairs to use when tagging the theme.

expiresIn.description: The date and time when the new access token expires.

refreshToken.description: The token to use to refresh a previously issued access token that might have expired.

entities.description: Represents the configuration of the exported components.

nextToken.description: The pagination token that's included if more results are available.

job.description: The configuration settings for the code generation job.

id.description: The unique ID for the code generation job.

appId.description: The ID of the Amplify app associated with the code generation job.

environmentName.description: The name of the backend environment associated with the code generation job.

renderConfig.description: Describes the configuration information for rendering the UI component associated with the code generation job.

script.description: The file type to use for a JavaScript project.

renderTypeDeclarations.description: Specifies whether the code generation job should render type declaration files.

inlineSourceMap.description: Specifies whether the code generation job should render inline source maps.

apiConfiguration.description: The API configuration for the code generation job.

graphQLConfig.description: The configuration for an application using GraphQL APIs.

dataStoreConfig.description: The configuration for an application using DataStore APIs.

noApiConfig.description: The configuration for an application with no API being used.

dependencies.description: Lists the dependency packages that may be required for the project code to run.

genericDataSchema.description: Describes the data schema for a code generation job.

dataSourceType.description: The type of the data source for the schema. Currently, the only valid value is an Amplify DataStore.

autoGenerateForms.description: Specifies whether to autogenerate forms in the code generation job.

features.description: Describes the feature flags that you can specify for a code generation job.

isRelationshipSupported.description: Specifes whether a code generation job supports data relationships.

isNonModelSupported.description: Specifies whether a code generation job supports non models.

status.description: The status of the code generation job.

statusMessage.description: The customized status message for the code generation job.

asset.description: The CodegenJobAsset to use for the code generation job.

downloadUrl.description: The URL to use to access the asset.

tags.description: One or more key-value pairs to use when tagging the code generation job.

createdAt.description: The time that the code generation job was created.

modifiedAt.description: The time that the code generation job was modified.
